subject: President Trump’s Budget >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This will be a budget that works for you, the American people. |

Friend, President Trump is putting the finishing touches on our America First budget. But in order to be a budget that truly works for the American people, he will need input from top grassroots leaders like you. Please take the Budget for America Survey to provide your special insight as President Trump prepares a budget that puts our citizens FIRST. Under President Trump, your government promises to work for you. And this is one of the most important steps you can take to ensure that we cut or preserve the programs you care about most. Please take the Budget for America Survey now. >> Thanks, Trump Headquarters
TAKE THE SURVEY

name: The White House
subject: In Case You Missed It: President Trump's First 50 Days
body:
50 days of fulfilling promises to the American people. |
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04cd413635aad736e029ce2c77f746a6719eb7accc745d95be646b748b3c0fb31d0e68259fcaffbf40e16b776e9dc7da79f7e8da91f883d7)

Friday marked fifty days since President Donald J. Trump was sworn in and started a new chapter of American greatness focusing on putting American citizens first and keeping his promises to all Americans.

Since that day, the President has worked tirelessly to make sure his Administration is achieving real results for the American people. Thanks to his determination and action, the Trump Administration has been successful in jumpstarting job creation, strengthening national security, and starting the process to fix American’s healthcare.

[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04cd413635aad736bafa6cea115c2969b293bea96ea6117424f7f8410797b09daac5204c6450c7dd669f3917d9d11ce06f8593cb371dfa94)
President Trump spent his first 50 days jumpstarting the economy and fulfilling his promises to all Americans.**To read more about President Trump’s First 50 Days of Action,[visit here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04cd413635aad736ab8b50a1211542be80c4838235b3d2b810cfa4e4fe073c8da0ea3ece1533be3f598778723ceed197e05f84ff8ecdab6a)**

**To see more of President Trump’s First 50 Days in photos,[visit here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04cd413635aad73611cfa08d440b2f53f4a29e15a203d0e0b65b7eda346275e58586b0c5cf1f2bc6fd32fda59bc892abb5ea6c7ee55f8ec4)**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04cd413635aad7362828f9f8e76dbbd88a6e45dcfa2a57ead233cf379a69a92618d9b8aacea6cc7641e261dc70e84690b089a365e0031423) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04cd413635aad73634cfabb8654b2c4e9fed24d4f98ecc3d8b33ef78ac24b6951af506a768e994632d84804c8119585943bd2ae6c68725c4)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d43e63019afa79a01aa91ed025f999943192e61cf0cec96bd8c76ee186a8faa79341020c7a3dde6b8b1a1405b1f4591d5c)

Trump was sworn in and started a new chapter of American greatness focusing on putting American citizens first and keeping his promises to all Americans. name: Team Kasich
subject: The Latest
body:
Gov. John Kasich was a guest on NBC's Meet the Press where he
spoke about the need for both parties of Congress to work
together to fix Obamacare.

Peter, Gov. John Kasich was a
guest on NBC's Meet the Press where he spoke about the need for
both parties of Congress to work together to fix Obamacare. Watch
the interview (here).

Gov. Kasich also issued the
following statement about the U.S. House's Obamacare proposal:

In case you missed it, the
governor also published a guest column in the New York Times
encouraging Republicans and Democrats to work together on a
solution. Read it (here).

With our nation's debt
approaching $20 trillion, the governor shared his thoughts on
need for a balanced budget. Read it (here).

Thank you for your ongoing
support!

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com
